# Project Overview

This project is a Student Information Management System for the course COMP603 Program Design and Construction.

## Coding Standards

-   It is bug-free and has robust error handling.
-   It strictly follows SOLID design principles.
-   It is using NetBeans 23 and JDK 21.
-   It has comprehensive unit tests with high code coverage.
-   It has very high code quality, following best practices and design patterns.
